requirements.requirement: The system shall store playlogs from players.
Each playlog must have a date, client, and player assigned.
The system shall store player connections.
Each connection must have a date, client, and player assigned.
The connection status can only be 'connected' or 'not connected'.
The system shall store actions performed on the platform.
Each action must have a date, client, user, and player assigned.
All actions must be performed on a platform entity.
Authorized users shall be able to list playlogs in the system.
The playlogs visible to a user shall depend on their permissions.
All details of a playlog shall be viewable.
Authorized users shall be able to list player connections in the system.
The connections visible to a user shall depend on their permissions.
Connections can only have two states: 'connected' or 'not connected'.
Authorized users shall be able to list actions performed on platform entities.
The actions visible to a user shall depend on their permissions.
All actions must be related to a platform entity.
The system shall respond to any user action in less than 5 seconds.
The system shall be available at all times, except during scheduled updates.
The system shall support an unlimited number of simultaneous connections.
The platform shall scale dynamically with changes in the number of simultaneous connections.
The system shall automatically scale as data volume increases.
Project functionalities shall only be accessible to users with appropriate permissions.
Users without permission shall not access data they are not authorized to view.
Confidential user information shall be protected to ensure privacy.
Users shall only be able to view their own confidential data and no one else's.
